channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Work with Codex from anywhere
item.description: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/work-with-codex-from-anywhere

item.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
item.description: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/chatgpt-recognize-context-in-sensitive-conversations

item.title: How finance teams use Codex
item.description: See how finance teams can use Codex to build MBRs, reporting packs, variance bridges, model checks, and planning scenarios from real work inputs. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/how-finance-teams-use-codex

item.title: AutoScout24 scales engineering with AI-powered workflows
item.description: Learn how AutoScout24 Group uses Codex and ChatGPT to speed development cycles, improve code quality, and expand AI adoption. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/autoscout24

item.title: How NVIDIA engineers and researchers build with Codex
item.description: Teams use Codex with GPT-5.5 to ship production systems and turn research ideas into runnable experiments. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/nvidia

item.title: What Parameter Golf taught us about AI-assisted research
item.description: Parameter Golf brought together 1,000+ participants and 2,000+ submissions to explore AI-assisted machine learning research, coding agents, quantization, and novel model design under strict constraints. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/what-parameter-golf-taught-us

item.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
item.description: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption. Link to article: https://openai.com/signals/research/2026q1-update

item.title: How enterprises are scaling AI
item.description: How enterprises scale AI: from early experiments to compounding impact through trust, governance, workflow design, and quality at scale. Link to article: https://openai.com/business/guides-and-resources/how-enterprises-are-scaling-ai

item.title: OpenAI Campus Network: Student club interest form
item.description: Join the OpenAI Campus Network—connect student clubs worldwide, access AI tools, host events, and build an AI-powered campus community. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/openai-campus-network-student-club-interest-form

item.title: OpenAI launches DeployCo to help businesses build around intelligence
item.description: OpenAI launches DeployCo, a new enterprise deployment company built to help organizations bring frontier AI into production and turn it into measurable business impact. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/openai-launches-the-deployment-company

item.title: Running Codex safely at OpenAI
item.description: How OpenAI runs Codex securely with sandboxing, approvals, network policies, and agent-native telemetry to support safe and compliant coding agent adoption. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/running-codex-safely

item.title: Scaling Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber
item.description: OpenAI expands Trusted Access for Cyber with GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5-Cyber, helping verified defenders accelerate vulnerability research and protect critical infrastructure. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-with-trusted-access-for-cyber

item.title: Parloa builds service agents customers want to talk to
item.description: Parloa leverages OpenAI models to power scalable, voice-driven AI customer service agents, enabling enterprises to design, simulate, and deploy reliable, real-time interactions. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/parloa

item.title: Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
item.description: Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/advancing-voice-intelligence-with-new-models-in-the-api

item.title: Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT
item.description: Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/introducing-trusted-contact-in-chatgpt

item.title: Testing ads in ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, with clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/testing-ads-in-chatgpt
